suite.name: Registrar

kw.name: Abrir Navegador
Open Browser

kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: CT01 - Botão Verificar deve estar visível na página
test.doc: Verifica se o botão "Verificar" está presente e visível na página do calendário.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED (Session info: chrome=149.0.7827.53) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7723133f5+14875] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff772313450+148d0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff771e6778d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff771e6432e] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff771e54591] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff771e563ff] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff771e54b33] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff771e542fb] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff771e53fb1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff771e51c67] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff771e523e2] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff771e6ba36] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff771f0f824] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff771eea27a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff771f0e9fc] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff771eb3eb0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff771eb4e23] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7728f6c61+5f80e1] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7728f0feb+5f246b] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7729162d5+617755] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7723303ae+3182e] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff772338acc+39f4c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff77231cac4+1df44] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff77231cc54+1e0d4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff772300957+1dd7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffb124be957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffb13707c1c+2c]

test.name: CT02 - Botão Verificar não deve aparecer na página
test.doc: Verifica que o botão "Verificar" não está presente na página do calendário.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc: Testes de verificação do botão na página de calendário
